The '''Spar sector''' was a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] that was a part of the [[Inner Zuma Region]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Along with the [[Ablajeck sector/Legends|Ablajeck sector]], it bordered the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]].
